## 📋 Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## 🔗 Related Issue
<!-- Closes #<issue_number> -->

## 🧪 Type of Change
- [ ] 🏗️ `chore` — build, config, dependencies
- [ ] ✨ `feat` — new feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — code refactor
- [ ] 🧪 `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] 📚 `docs` — documentation only

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project's Clean Architecture guidelines
- [ ] No hardcoded strings or values
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated where applicable
- [ ] Build passes with no errors or warnings
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before opening this PR
